# Code of Conduct

We want this project to be a welcoming, useful place to learn and improve
AI-assisted software delivery. Participants must help keep discussions
professional, respectful, and focused on the work.

Expected behaviour:

- be considerate and assume good intent while challenging ideas with evidence;
- explain context and welcome questions from people at different experience
  levels;
- give credit, receive feedback constructively, and keep discussions on topic;
- protect confidential information, credentials, and private customer data.

Unacceptable behaviour includes harassment, discrimination, personal attacks,
threats, sexualised conduct, deliberate disruption, doxxing, publishing private
information, or sharing secrets and proprietary content in issues, prompts, or
pull requests.

## Reporting

Do not report safety or security-sensitive information publicly. Follow
[`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md) for vulnerability reports. For other conduct
concerns, contact the repository owner privately through the GitHub profile or
open an issue without sensitive details and request private follow-up.

Reports will be handled discreetly and reviewed fairly. The maintainers may
remove comments, close discussions, or restrict participation when needed to
protect people and the project.

This policy is adapted for this repository from the principles of the
[Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).
